parameters.name: request_write_action
parameters.description: Call this to request an approved write action — when the operator asks to RUN / EXECUTE / ACTIVATE / ENABLE / TURN ON / STOP / DEACTIVATE / DISABLE / TURN OFF an n8n automation, or to RUN a GitHub Actions workflow. Calling this tool IS how the operator's ✅/❌ approval buttons get sent in Telegram; the action runs ONLY after they tap ✅. Fill in the fields. For n8n, get target_id (the workflow id) from list_workflows first if you don't have it. Call it immediately when the operator asks for the action — do NOT ask them for permission first and do NOT describe it in words instead of calling. After it returns, tell the operator you've sent them an approval request to confirm.
parameters.inputSchema: {"type":"object","required":["target_system","action_type","target_id","human_summary"],"properties":{"target_system":{"type":"string","enum":["n8n","github"],"description":"n8n for an n8n automation; github for a GitHub Actions workflow"},"action_type":{"type":"string","description":"for n8n use activate or deactivate; for github use dispatch"},"target_id":{"type":"string","description":"for n8n: the workflow id from list_workflows; for github: the workflow file name, e.g. deploy.yml"},"human_summary":{"type":"string","description":"one short, clear Hebrew sentence describing exactly what will happen"}}}
